name: Merry-Go-Round on a wooden horse
description: I'm in a Merry-Go-Round on a wooden horse
items_start: Pole coming out of horse's back
hints: You're riding a wooden horse on the merry-go-round. There's a pole sticking up.
The pole is important - you can climb it or use it somehow to reach higher.
GO POLE or CLIM POLE to climb up to the top of the ride.
D gets off the horse. You need to reach the top of the ride (room 22) to access the catwalk.
notes: On the merry-go-round horse. The pole can be climbed to reach the top of the ride (room 22). D=merry-go-round floor (room 18).
